title: Tseltsach #6766
definition:
Zelzah = "shadow"

 1) a place on the boundary of Benjamin, close to Rachel's tomb,
    5 miles (8 km) southwest of Jerusalem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zelzah = "shadow"

 1) a place on the boundary of Benjamin, close to Rachel's tomb,
    5 miles (8 km) southwest of Jerusalem

    NASB:  a place in Benjamin
